data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes interface elements placement for faster user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Buttons sized for easy touch and placed in the most likely activation zones.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits choices per screen to aid user decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive design with dropdowns and progressive disclosure techniques.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances perceived usability through polished visual design.
data.technical_spec: High-definition visuals and thematic color palettes with gradient usage.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations by matching common usage patterns.
data.technical_spec: Follows established web standards for navigation and content layout.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Motivates users by designing unfinished tasks to enhance engagement.
data.technical_spec: Persistent notification badges and progress bars.
